danger_signals.visual_form: Hostile creatures (goblins, monsters) in dungeon spaces
danger_signals.meaning: Active threats in current area; combat may be imminent

danger_signals.visual_form: Areas below minimum brightness threshold; obscured environment
danger_signals.meaning: Reduced visibility indicates danger or unknown territory; hazards cannot be properly assessed

danger_signals.visual_form: Descending through multi-level cave system; architectural complexity increases
danger_signals.meaning: Deeper levels of Stygian Abyss contain greater dangers and more powerful adversaries

danger_signals.visual_form: Creatures actively pursuing or attacking player character
danger_signals.meaning: Entity has detected threat and initiated combat engagement

danger_signals.visual_form: Light sources burning out; weapon deterioration visible in inventory
danger_signals.meaning: Survival capacity decreasing; vulnerability increasing without resupply

safety_signals.visual_form: Areas above minimum brightness threshold; carried light sources extending line of sight
safety_signals.meaning: Environment is visible and navigable; hazards can be anticipated

safety_signals.visual_form: Non-player characters visible in dungeon spaces, especially in settled areas
safety_signals.meaning: Civilized zone with trading potential and information availability; reduced immediate danger

safety_signals.visual_form: Designated prayer/meditation spaces within dungeon structure
safety_signals.meaning: Safe points for skill development and spiritual progression; areas of sanctuary

safety_signals.visual_form: Map auto-fills for explored areas; player-added notes on familiar locations
safety_signals.meaning: Known territory reduces hazard unpredictability; landmarks establish bearings
Current area is not actively occupied by threats; safe for rest and resource management

faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: Goblins and monsters serve as visual opposition to Avatar's mission
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Shrines with mantras indicate Avatar-aligned spiritual locations; rescued/befriended NPCs cluster near safe zones

faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: Creature design and behavior distinguish hostile from neutral NPCs
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Monster presence concentrated in deeper dungeon levels; territorial control of dangerous zones

faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: Distinguishable through NPC interaction versus creature hostility
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Architectural structures, trade goods, and NPC settlements indicate failed utopian society infrastructure

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Baron's daughter kidnapped; quest objective established
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Avatar must descend into Stygian Abyss; non-linear exploration of multi-level dungeon required

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Map auto-fills based on explored areas above minimum brightness; inventory displays carried equipment and light sources
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Player navigates freely through dungeon levels; monsters are encountered dynamically; NPCs available for dialogue and trade

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Fight icon selected; player weapon appears on screen; enemy creature positioned for real-time attack exchange
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Enemies attempt to defeat Avatar in real-time combat; some may flee when near death; player must time clicks for damage variation

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Light sources visibly burning out; weapon deterioration displayed in inventory; hunger/fatigue indicated through character status
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Avatar must seek safe resting locations; search for fresh light sources; prioritize survival over exploration

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Shrines appear as distinct architectural features; mantras displayed when recited at prayer locations
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Experience point accumulation triggers leveling; mantra recitation increases specific skill proficiencies

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Architectural remnants of advanced society scattered throughout dungeon; mixture of functional and decaying structures
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: NPCs inhabit structured zones; trade systems operate within civilization remnants; juxtaposition of order and chaos

environmental_storytelling.example: Dungeon structures progress from organized civilization remnants to chaotic monster territories; visual transition indicates societal collapse
Useful items, useless items, and interactive objects distributed non-uniformly; contextual placement suggests NPC activities and resource scarcity
Natural vs. unnatural light sources indicate which areas were originally habitable versus overtaken by darkness and monsters
Civilized NPCs grouped in defended or protected zones; their spatial distribution indicates safe routes through dungeon

environmental_storytelling.visual_manifestation: Visual wear on equipment communicates survival duration and resource management pressure throughout adventure

environmental_storytelling.example: Descent through multiple dungeon levels reveals progression from shallow habitable zones to deep hostile territories; vertical space communicates danger escalation

entity_behavioral_tells.behavior: Walks naturally through dungeon; ignores avatar unless provoked
Actively pursues Avatar; engages in real-time combat; may attempt escape if health critically low
Presents dialogue menu; willing to trade possessions; provides information and quest opportunities
May become hostile if attacked; defensive behavior indicates faction loyalty or self-preservation
Selected Fight icon; weapon visible at screen bottom; cursor controls attack timing and direction variation
Movement slowed by fatigue/hunger; light source extinguished or dimmed; reduced combat effectiveness
Avoids combat through careful positioning; NPCs and creatures have reduced detection radius

notes: Ultima Underworld communicates world-state primarily through light/darkness mechanics and environmental density rather than explicit UI indicators. The game's 'dungeon simulation' design means visual communication is subtle: monster presence indicates danger zones, NPC density indicates safety, architectural complexity indicates dungeon depth and threat escalation. The failed utopian civilization is conveyed through environmental juxtaposition—remnants of advanced structures coexist with monster infestation. Resource management (light source duration, weapon wear, food/rest needs) creates visual signals of survival pressure. The absence of faction color-coding or explicit sigils means faction identity is conveyed through behavior: creatures vs. NPCs, hostile vs. trading. Vertical navigation (multi-level descent) is the primary world-state communicator—deeper = more dangerous. First-person perspective limits faction visual signaling to creature type and NPC dialogue context rather than environmental markers like banners or territory control.
sources_used: wikipedia - Ultima Underworld: The Stygian Abyss (gameplay, setting, design philosophy)
